name: arkyn
description: A comprehensive TypeScript ecosystem for building modern web applications with React and Remix, featuring UI components, server utilities, shared tools, and data templates.
author: Arkyn | Lucas Gonçalves

scripts.all:update-packages: cd packages/components && bun update && cd ../server && bun update && cd ../shared && bun update && cd ../templates && bun update
scripts.all:update-versions: cd packages/components && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../server && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../shared && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../templates && npm version patch --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.all:update-beta-versions: cd packages/components && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && cd ../server && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && cd ../shared && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && cd ../templates && npm version prerelease --preid=beta
scripts.all:typecheck: bun run typecheck:server && bun run typecheck:shared && bun run typecheck:components
scripts.all:build: bun run build:templates && bun run build:shared && bun run build:server && bun run build:components
scripts.all:beta: bun run beta:components && bun run beta:server && bun run beta:shared && bun run beta:templates
scripts.all:prod: bun run prod:components && bun run prod:server && bun run prod:shared && bun run prod:templates
scripts.all:test: bun run test:shared && bun run test:server
scripts.beta:components: cd packages/components && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:server: cd packages/server && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:shared: cd packages/shared && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
scripts.beta:templates: cd packages/templates && npm version prerelease --preid=beta && npm publish --tag beta
